时不渲染 modal 内容: Do not render modal content when closed

中文主标，例 '学员求职总览'。必传: Chinese main title, e.g., 'Student Job Search Overview'. Required
英文标题，例 'Job Overview'。同行内联渲染（h1 内嵌 span）: English title, e.g., 'Job Overview'. Inline rendered in the same line (h1 with embedded span). Optional
副标说明，例 '查看我辅导和管理的学员求职进度'。可选: Subtitle description, e.g., 'View the job search progress of students I mentor and manage'. Optional
关键：不强制 uppercase，与 V1 内嵌端视觉一致: Key: no forced uppercase, visually consistent with V1 embedded client

行业展开后显示公司列表: Company list shown when industry is expanded
点击 industry 标题触发 toggleIndustry 事件: Clicking industry header triggers toggleIndustry event
嵌套表 8 列定义（与原型一致：去掉 list 视图的\"公司\"和\"行业\": Nested table 8-column definition (consistent with prototype: removes 'Company' and 'Industry' columns from list view)
数值为 0 也应正常显示（不省略: Value of 0 should display normally (not omitted)
多行数据能 mount，不抛错: Multi-row data can mount without errors
分页配置；传 false 关闭分页: Pagination config; pass false to disable pagination
自定义列定义（覆盖默认 9 列）；不传时用: Custom column definitions (overrides default 9 columns); uses default when not provided
用户操作分页 / 排序 / 筛选时触发（透传 a-table change 事件: Triggered on pagination / sorting / filtering (passes through a-table change event)
用户点击\"X 人\"链接，请求打开学员: User clicks "X students" link, requesting to open student
公司 logo 文字（如 \"GS\" / \"MS\"）；未提供时父组件可由: Company logo text (e.g., "GS" / "MS"); parent component can derive from companyName if not provided
公司 logo 背景色 hex（覆盖 industryTone）；未提供时按 i: Company logo background color hex (overrides industryTone); uses industryTone color if not provided
行业 tone（决定 industry-tag 颜色 + logo 颜色: Industry tone (determines industry-tag color + logo color)
岗位分类（已解析字典 label，如 \"暑期实习: Position category (resolved dictionary label, e.g., "Summer Internship")
招聘周期 tone（用于 cycle-tag 着色，可选: Hiring cycle tone (used for cycle-tag coloring, optional)
我的学员数（点击数字打开: My students count (click number to open)
命中该岗位的所带学生数（assistant 端聚合视图特有: Number of students matching this position (specific to assistant-side aggregated view)
多地区合并字符串（如 \"Beijing, Hong Kong\"），可选: Multi-location merged string (e.g., "Beijing, Hong Kong"), optional
唯一 key（建议字典 value 或原始 industry 字符串: Unique key (recommended: dictionary value or raw industry string)
该行业下公司数: Number of companies in this industry
该行业下岗位数: Number of positions in this industry
返回 raw input (空时返回空: Return raw input (return empty when empty)
类型（英文 enum 或中文 label，组件自动归一化: Type (English enum or Chinese label, component auto-normalizes)

渲染单个圆形 div 容器: Render a single circular div container

姓名为空时的 fallback 字符: Fallback character when name is empty

验证验证码 API 返回值（必须含 resetToken 用于后续重置: Verify verification code API response (must include resetToken for subsequent reset)

兜底为 \"\"（后端 DTO 裁剪），前端转成: Fallback to "" (backend DTO trimmed), frontend converts to

本周事件列表（含距离标签: This week's event list (with distance labels)

使用上次参数 + 当前分页重新拉取（用于删改后刷新: Re-fetch using last params + current pagination (for refresh after edit/delete)
重置分页到第 1 页并拉取（用于搜索/筛选条件变化: Reset pagination to page 1 and fetch (for search/filter condition changes)
面试日历事件（所有端共享最小集: Interview calendar event (shared minimal set across all clients)
后端 calendar endpoint 过滤了 null，但复用到 list: Backend calendar endpoint filters null, but may be empty when reused in list scenarios, so declared optional; fallback handled inside composable
辅导状态，用于色彩语义派生: Coaching status, used for color semantic derivation
